proposed_status_row.notes: Paper is an overview/simulation-method source and does not expose the full LINVER equation system; MMB implementation used only as cross-check; Dynare not run.

commands_to_run: python3 - <<'PY' ... compare English and Chinese F-number counts ... PY

unresolved_issues: Full source-level equation extraction requires official LINVER package/manual or FRB/US documentation.
Policy-rule formulas with ELB/threshold constraints need targeted formula checking because Markdown OCR has placeholders.
Exact baseline vector and variable-specific scaling were not reconstructed.
Variant-specific expectation differences should be reconciled against official Modelbase/LINVER documentation before promotion.
